sql_array: CREATE TABLE languages (id UInt32, text String);
INSERT INTO languages VALUES (1, detectLanguageUnknown('Bonjour! Comment ça va?'));
UPDATE languages SET text = detectLanguageUnknown('Hola! ¿Cómo estás?') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, detectLanguageUnknown(text) AS detected_lang FROM languages;
SELECT detectLanguageUnknown('Привет! Как дела?') AS detected_language;
